response.justification: Candidate has strong general software engineering experience across many languages and platforms, but lacks the specific deep Java/Kotlin/JVM and Spring ecosystem expertise required for this enterprise IDE role. Java appears only briefly in older roles (robotic arms, mobile orchestration) with no evidence of Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, or IDE internals work. Primary stack is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, not JVM tooling.
strengths: Prior IDE-adjacent experience at National Instruments working on LabWindows/CVI
Strong software craftsmanship background (TDD, refactoring dojos, testing tooling)
Proven ability to work on complex systems and build developer tooling/frameworks
concerns: No demonstrated Spring/Quarkus/Hibernate or modern enterprise Java framework experience
Kotlin not mentioned anywhere in the resume
JVM and Java work is dated and peripheral; primary expertise is in TypeScript/Node and DLang

key_factors.factor: Java experience is dated and limited
